title: galium hochstetteri
intro: Galium hochstetteri, also known as Hochstetter's bedstraw, is a plant species in the bedstraw family (Galium) native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Galium hochstetteri include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Galium hochstetteri is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin irritations and wounds.
